"[4] ^WIND ADVISORY ISSUED THROUGHOUT THE ANTELOPE VALLEY AREA: SR-14 FROM AVE A TO RED ROVER MINE. SR-138 FROM SR-14 TO SR-18. STRONG WINDS, HIGH PROFILE VEHICLES, CAMPERS, TRAILERS USE CAUTION. REF LOG: 1942"

"[3] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY CONTINUED IN THE EAST LOS ANGELES AREA: E CESAR E CHAVEZ AVE WILL BE CLOSED FROM HUMPHREYS AVE TO MARIANNA AVE. EASTERN AVE WILL ALSO BE CLOSED FROM DOZIER ST TO NEW YORK ST. CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC HAZARD. REF LOG: 3070"
"[15] *** UPDATE ***THE VEHICLE HAS BEEN LOCATED. THE VICTIM AND SUSPECT ARE STILL MISSING."
